heading: Today
text: Clearing east and north this morning.  Sun mixing with afternoon clouds.

heading: Tuesday Night
text: Periods of clouds, with a few snow showers Rt. 2 north. Becoming partly cloudy south.

heading: Wednesday
text: Early snow showers north, then some sun. Sun south, then more clouds. Milder.

heading: Thursday
text: Rain showers likely especially north. Warmer.
